author: doll-agent
content: Add unique_axis(a, axis) to ferray-stats/src/searching.rs. Gathers each hyperslice along axis into a Vec<T> in canonical (outer, inner) order, sorts axis-indices via lex partial_cmp, dedupes consecutive-equal slices, scatters the kept slices back into a contiguous output array. Output shape is the input shape with axis-dim replaced by the unique-slice count. 6 new tests cover row dedup (axis=0), column dedup (axis=1), all-distinct sort behavior, all-same collapse, deeper-rank example with row-equality, and axis-out-of-bounds. Re-exported from ferray-stats crate root.
